name: @vaipakam/lib
description: Framework-agnostic shared utilities consumed by every app in the monorepo (apps/defi today; apps/labs / apps/agent / apps/indexer / apps/keeper in later stages). Stage 2a scope: multicall (viem helpers), decodeContractError (error normaliser), chainPlatforms (chainId → CoinGecko platform slug), canonicalAssets (per-chain ERC-20 lists). format + journeyLog are deferred until their Vite-coupled deps (i18n, contracts/config) are extracted.
